title: What to Expect From Parker-Hannifin's (PH) Q4 Earnings?
text: Benefits from the Win strategy and contribution from the Meggitt acquisition are likely to have boosted Parker-Hannifin's (PH) Q4 performance.

title: Parker to Announce Fiscal 2023 Fourth Quarter and Full Year Earnings on August 3rd; Conference Call and Webcast Scheduled for 11 a.m. Eastern
text: CLEVELAND, July 25, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Parker Hannifin Corporation (NYSE: PH), the global leader in motion and control technologies, today announced that it will release its fiscal 2023 fourth quarter and full year earnings before the market opens on Thursday, August 3, 2023, followed by a conference call at 11:00 a.m., Eastern time. During the call, the company will discuss fiscal 2023 fourth quarter and full year results and respond to questions from institutional investors and security analysts. The conference call will be webcast simultaneously on Parker's investor information website at  www.phstock.com  with an accompanying slide presentation. The webcast will be archived on the site and available for replay later that day.

title: The Retirees' Dividend Portfolio: John And Jane's June 2023 Taxable Account Update
text: The Taxable Account generated $2,111.31 of dividend income for June 2023 compared with $1,825.40 of dividend income for June 2022. The Taxable Account had a balance of $533.9K as of June 30, 2023, vs. $493.5K on June 30, 2022. The annualized cost basis yield is 5.44%. Five companies in the Taxable portfolio paid increased dividends or paid a special dividend during the month of June.
